---
title: "Teaching"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

### University of Oklahoma

Instructor

- International Trade & Spatial Economics (PhD), Spring 2025
- Intermediate Macroeconomics, Fall 2024

### Yale University

Teaching Assistant

- Intermediate Microeconomics, Summer 2021
- Intermediate Macroeconomics, Fall 2020
- Introductory Microeconomics, Fall 2021 & Fall 2022
- Introductory Macroeconomics, Spring 2021, Spring 2022 & Spring 2024
